messages.content: I'm great — here are two picks: Bali — dreamy beaches, temples and affordable stays; Lisbon — sunny, charming, and wallet-friendly. Which of these sounds exciting?

steps.prompt: Web Search: I'm great—thanks! Ready to help plan your next trip; where would you like to go or what can I help with today?
steps.response: Wondering how to plan a trip ? I've got you covered with 15 easy steps to planning a travel itinerary for the perfect vacation! This step-by-step travel checklist will take away the stress of planning and give you an easy to follow list to prepare your trip like a pro. As a travel agent, your day- to -day is filled with quote requests, itineraries, planning, customer service, and much more. Having email templates on hand is a great way to maximize your productivity while still ensuring you are taking care of your customers. Here are 18 free templates you can use for your travel agency. Planning a travel itinerary and not sure how to start? This complete guide will walk you through the itinerary planning process step-by-step. If you're getting ready for your first trip and wondering how to plan a travel itinerary, I've got you covered.
